overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy exploring a lush post-apocalyptic valley. She wades through a shallow stream, enters an organic wooden tunnel structure, emerges into a vibrant flower garden, and approaches a large ceremonial archway with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow stream bed approaching organic tribal structure

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow stream water toward a large organic building built around a tree

entered.detail: clear shallow stream with visible rocky bottom
large multi-level structure built around a tree with wooden platforms
tall reddish rock formations lining the valley
mossy green banks alongside the stream

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking through a shallow stream in a narrow valley. A large organic tribal structure built around a tree looms ahead, framed by red rock cliffs and lush grassy banks.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden tunnel with organic architecture

events.description: entering covered tunnel structure with wooden arches and hanging lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit organic tunnel with woven wooden walls

entered.detail: arched tunnel entrance made of twisted wood and woven materials
glowing lanterns suspended from the tunnel ceiling
stacked bamboo construction materials along the tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters a covered tunnel with organic wooden architecture. The stream and cliffs are left behind as she moves through the dimly lit passage with hanging lanterns and bamboo structures lining the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit garden valley with wildflowers and stone terraces

events.description: exiting tunnel into bright open garden with colorful flowers and stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking through vibrant flower garden with purple and yellow wildflowers

entered.detail: dense patches of colorful wildflowers in purple, yellow, and pink
stacked stone retaining walls forming garden terraces
hazy mountain range visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: Aloy emerges from the tunnel into a sunlit garden bursting with colorful wildflowers. Stone walls form terraces on the right while the path leads toward distant mountains. The tunnel entrance falls behind as the landscape opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley with ceremonial archway and mountain vista

events.description: passing under the large organic ceremonial archway

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking under a large ceremonial archway toward snow-capped peaks

entered.detail: large decorative arch made of twisted wood and bone with hanging ornaments
prominent snow-covered mountain peaks in the background

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Aloy walking through an open valley toward an impressive organic archway. As she passes under the arch, the snow-capped mountains become fully visible in the distance. The garden terraces and previous structures fade from view as she continues along the dirt path into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Aloy travels from a narrow river valley through a sheltered passage and into a vast, open wilderness. It begins with her wading through a shallow stream framed by red rock cliffs, moving steadily toward a large organic tribal structure built around a tree. As she enters the structure, the bright valley is replaced by a dimly lit wooden tunnel lined with bamboo and hanging lanterns. The scene then opens into a sunlit garden bursting with colorful wildflowers and stone terraces before the path leads her toward an impressive organic archway. Finally, as she passes under the arch, the landscape expands fully to reveal towering snow-capped mountains in the distance.
